title: Optimize setup workflow for faster configuration

scope_decisions.step1_snapshot: Step 1 loads the cached machine profile as an advisory snapshot. It no longer blocks setup when cached data says a harness or engine category is missing.
scope_decisions.step2_gate: The category-level install gate is removed. Install prompts happen only after the user chooses a specific harness or engine.
scope_decisions.stale_cache_fix: Step 3 live-checks the selected harness and selected engine before trusting cache data, correcting stale missing/present status without probing unrelated components.
scope_decisions.force_scan_semantics: --force-scan clears only the in-process machine-profile snapshot during setup. It does not delete the file cache, rebuild every backend, or imply llmfit.
scope_decisions.llmfit_refresh: --run-llmfit refreshes only the llmfit system block and recommendations. It is separate from selected harness/engine checks.
scope_decisions.non_interactive: Non-interactive mode live-checks the cached default harness/engine candidates and fails clearly if the cache is stale and no candidate is currently available.

approach_summary: Restore the issue #79 flow by making broad discovery advisory and moving authoritative checks to the user's selected components. This prevents stale cache decisions while avoiding a full rescan of every supported backend when only one harness and one engine matter.

ac_mapping.AC1_harness_first: Step 1 no longer routes into a category-level install gate; Step 3 remains the harness-first picker.
ac_mapping.AC2_detect_status: The selected harness/engine are live-checked via targeted refresh helpers before setup proceeds.
ac_mapping.AC3_install_only_when_missing: _ensure_tool is called only after the selected component fails its live check.
ac_mapping.AC4_lazy_llmfit: Step 1 still skips llmfit by default. --run-llmfit refreshes only llmfit data, and Step 4 can still request recommendations on demand.
ac_mapping.AC5_combined_model_list: The existing Step 4 merged installed/cached picker is preserved; selected engine model data is refreshed before the picker reads it.

constraints_honored: No broad scan on setup --force-scan when a file cache exists
No llmfit scan unless --run-llmfit or an explicit model recommendation path needs it
STEPS IDs remain unchanged for existing WizardState migration
risks: Fallback harness/engine lists still reflect cached non-selected components; they are validated only if later selected.
If there is no file cache at all, machine_profile still builds an initial broad snapshot. This change focuses on avoiding broad rescans after cache exists.
